## Governance Checklist

- [ ] Reviewed generated governance changes
- [ ] Verified provider bootstrap status
- [ ] Confirmed worktree-backed validation results
- [ ] Refreshed .devops file index before publish

## Required Capability Checks

- [ ] check-backend-api
- [ ] check-domain-logic
- [ ] check-external-integration
- [ ] check-infra-workflow
- [ ] check-llm-modeling
